title: Panel Position
text: Panel Position Position of the panel for a form or application shell when displayed at runtime. Value Description Default Default position for the platform T (top) Top of the window B (bottom) Bottom of the window R (right) Right side of the window L (left) Left side of the window F (float) Panel can float freely Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: None Description If you are defining components for use in multiple operating environments, it is recommended that you not set this property, leaving it to the default. The meaning of the definition depends on the GUI being used. Applies To Application Shells for Desktop Applications Forms Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
